model.name: First-pass LTV model (proxy-based)

definition.active_user_definition: User who completes >=1 withdrawal in a month
definition.gross_profit_driver: FX margin (spread/fee) applied to withdrawal volume

notes: Inputs contain event counts but not withdrawal amounts, unique users, or cohort-clean outcomes.
Transaction proxies (withdraw/deposit events) include returning users; they are demand/maturity signals rather than new-cohort LTV.

scenario_construction.low: low volume + low margin + short lifetime
scenario_construction.base: base volume + base margin + medium lifetime
scenario_construction.high: high volume + high margin + long lifetime

warnings: Event totals are not unique users.
Withdraw/deposit totals are not cohort-pure (include returning users).
KYC Started includes returning users in some funnels; treat as directional only.

optional_acquisition_adjusted.description: Very rough proxy: LTV_per_install ~= LTV_per_active_user * (KYC_submit / installs). Use only for CAC sanity checks.
warnings: KYC_submit/install is not a true activation rate; still not cohort-clean.
If some rails allow transactions without KYC, this proxy understates NG/EG new-cohort LTV.

missing_data_to_upgrade_model: Withdrawal volume ($) by country (total + distribution; avg withdrawal amount).
Net margin on that volume by rail (FX spread/fee minus costs).
Unique transacting users per month by country and withdrawals-per-user.
Cohort retention curve by country (cohort by first withdrawal month).
